title: Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8 - Ministry of Education
content:
## Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
The curriculum guide sets out what your child is learning at school each year and how you and your family can support them to achieve.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- First 6 months at school
- Year 1 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 3 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 4 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 5 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 6 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 7 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 8 New Zealand Curriculum
We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## Understanding your child's learning #
The Parent Portal is a collection of guidance and resources for parents, families and carers.
This year-by-year learning guide covers the New Zealand Curriculum and covers Years 1 to 8.
The guide is structured by year level. Choose your child's level and find ways to understand what they do at school, and how you can support them to achieve what they need to this year.
- First 6 months at school The first few months at school are an exciting and challenging time for children. Find out what they'll be learning and how you can support them at home. Find out more

### First 6 months at school
The first few months at school are an exciting and challenging time for children. Find out what they'll be learning and how you can support them at home.
- Year 1 New Zealand Curriculum Understand what your child will have learned by the end of their first year of school. See suggestions for simple things you can do at home to help them learn. Find out more

### Year 1 New Zealand Curriculum
Understand what your child will have learned by the end of their first year of school. See suggestions for simple things you can do at home to help them learn.
- Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum Understand what your child will have learned by the end of their second year at school, and how you can support this learning at home. Find out more

### Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum

- Year 3 New Zealand Curriculum Information to help you understand what your child learns in Year 3 at school, and ideas for helping them with their learning at home. Find out more

- Year 7 New Zealand Curriculum Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their seventh year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home. Find out more

- Year 8 New Zealand Curriculum Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by their eighth year at school, and guidance on ways you can help them further their learning at home. Find out more
